START:
Welcome to Anonim Chat

/find find a chat partner
/next stop current chat and find another partner
/stop stop the chat
/exit stop searching for a chat partner

/ping check bot status
/users current active users

/contribute contribute to the project/report a bug
HELP:
/find find a chat partner
/next stop current chat and find another partner
/stop stop the chat
/exit stop searching for a chat partner

/contribute contribute to the project/report a bug
CONTRIBUTE:
If you'd like to contribute to the bot:

- add features
- report bugs
- etc.

You can open a pull request or create an issue on GitHub

FIND.WARNING_1: You are already in the queue
FIND.WARNING_2: You are already in a chat

NEXT.WARNING_1:
You don't have a chat partner

/find to search for a chat partner

STOP.WARNING_1:
You don't have a chat partner

/find to search for a chat partner

EXIT.SUCCESS_1: Stopped searching for a chat partner
EXIT.WARNING_1: You are not in the queue

CONNECT.WARNING_1:
You don't have a chat partner

/find to search for a chat partner
